title: OER license + provenance + PII triage checklist (blocking gate)
context: The project's cardinal constraint is that items may only be derived from sources that explicitly permit derivative works. No item authoring may begin until a formal, committed license/provenance/PII triage gate exists. The gate must enumerate accepted licenses, state the objective PASS criterion (permitsDerivatives:true with a cited clause/URL), and specify PII screening. Failure to enforce this gate risks producing items from ND or unclear sources, which cannot be openly published and could constitute copyright infringement. This checklist is a blocking dependency for all per-unit authoring tasks.
objective: Produce a committed, auditable license + provenance + PII triage checklist that must be passed (with the artifact committed) before any item is authored from a source.
acceptanceCriteria: Enumerates accepted source licenses (Public Domain/CC0, CC-BY variants, CC-BY-SA variants, OGL) and excluded licenses (CC-BY-ND and CC-BY-NC-ND categorically excluded; CC-BY-NC deferred to policy-004; all-rights-reserved/unclear/unverifiable excluded).

States the objective PASS criterion: a source PASSes only if license.permitsDerivatives:true is recorded with a cited clause/URL; missing evidence, unparseable license, or ND terms = FLAG/EXCLUDE with no default-allow.

Specifies provenance recording: source URL, publisher, retrieval timestamp, source version/edition, license id + URL + committed license-text snapshot (SHA-256 + Wayback URL), and required attribution string.
Specifies PII screening: no real personal data may be embedded; any signal in a reused passage or dataset triggers rework or exclusion; scenarios must use synthetic, bias-screened contexts.
Defines the committed gate artifact format (PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE per OER unit, recording which checks ran and their results).
Document is CC-BY-4.0 licensed; commit is DCO signed-off.
resources: Creative Commons license summaries (CC-BY-4.0, CC-BY-SA-4.0, CC0, CC-BY-ND)
output: A committed license + provenance + PII triage checklist defining PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE criteria and the required gate artifact format, blocking all per-unit authoring until applied.
